{{Quote|You can imagine my surprise when a pair of piercing red eyes appeared from nowhere and the fog told me to keep my distance.|[[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Palpatine Essex Yerac|P. Essex Yerac's]] intelligence report on Vacander.|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Vacander''' was a [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]].

==Biography==
A gaseous being, almost impossible to detect and even more difficult to stop, Vacander was an expert stealing information. However, Vacander's modus operandi avoided any damage to people or equipment: He only stole information.

As a [[Spy/Legends|spy]], Vacander was associated with several [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] high-ranking officers, important gangsters and the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]; [[Siin Suub]] considered Vacander one of his favorite industrial spies. However, neither Suub nor the others knew Vacander's true aspect or even identity.

Although Vacander never worked against the interests of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the Rebel Alliance [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] considered Vacander a potential threat, so they destined a five-month research led by [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Palpatine Essex Yerac|P. Essex Yerac]]. The resulting dossier was scarce, including a bank account on [[Eczar]] and several message drop points through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Yerac, however, met Vacander once while tracking independent [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] through the fog banks of [[Karap Valley]], on [[Hewl]]. Disguised as the fog, Vacander suddenly revealed his red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] to Yerac and told him to keep his distance.

Vacander was believed to be a [[Gender/Legends|male]], and was known to be a polyglot, speaking [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], [[Sullustese/Legends|Sullustese]] and [[Nikto (language)|Nikto language]]. While Vacander was knowledgeable with the criminal underworld in general, he was specially acquainted with the illicit activities in [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]], the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] homeworld.
